title: State and Data Flow
description: Understand @State, @Binding, @ObservedObject, and @StateObject for managing data in SwiftUI.

sections.title: State Management Demo
sections.expectedOutput: A counter display with increment and reset buttons

sections.question: Which property wrapper should you use for a value that only matters within a single view?
sections.explanation: @State is for local state that only one view cares about and manages.
